parameters.query:
SELECT 
  p.project_number, p.name AS project_name, CONCAT(p.object_street, ', ', p.object_zip, ' ', p.object_city) AS address,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_room_measurements WHERE project_id = p.id) AS room_count,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
    'label', pmn.label, 'quantity', pmn.total_quantity, 'unit', pmn.quantity_unit,
    'product_name', pmn.product_name, 'unit_price', pmn.unit_price_net,
    'notes', pmn.notes, 'trade', pmn.trade,
    'supplier_name', s.name, 'supplier_email', s.email,
    'supplier_short', s.short_name
  ) ORDER BY s.name NULLS LAST, pmn.label)
  FROM project_material_needs pmn
  LEFT JOIN products prod ON prod.id = pmn.product_id
  LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON s.id = prod.supplier_id
  WHERE pmn.project_id = p.id AND pmn.source = 'auto' AND pmn.status = 'planned'
  ) AS materials,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
    'trade', sp.trade, 'start_date', sp.start_date, 'end_date', sp.end_date
  ) ORDER BY sp.start_date)
  FROM schedule_phases sp WHERE sp.project_id = p.id AND sp.status != 'cancelled'
  ) AS schedule
FROM projects p
WHERE p.id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').first().json.project_id }}'::uuid;
UPDATE events SET processed_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').first().json.event_id }}'::uuid;

SELECT 
  p.project_number, p.name AS project_name, CONCAT(p.object_street, ', ', p.object_zip, ' ', p.object_city) AS address,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_room_measurements WHERE project_id = p.id) AS room_count,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(

    'notes', pmn.notes, 'trade', pmn.trade,
    'supplier_name', s.name, 'supplier_email', s.email,
    'supplier_short', s.short_name
  ) ORDER BY s.name NULLS LAST, pmn.label)
  FROM project_material_needs pmn
  LEFT JOIN products prod ON prod.id = pmn.product_id
  LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON s.id = prod.supplier_id
  WHERE pmn.project_id = p.id AND pmn.source = 'auto' AND pmn.status = 'planned'

  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
    'trade', sp.trade, 'start_date', sp.start_date, 'end_date', sp.end_date
  ) ORDER BY sp.start_date)
  FROM schedule_phases sp WHERE sp.project_id = p.id AND sp.status != 'cancelled'

WHERE p.id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').first().json.project_id }}'::uuid;
UPDATE events SET processed_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').first().json.event_id }}'::uuid;
